arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds to rival Inter Milan for £21m Ligue 1 star
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to compete with Serie A champions Inter Milan for the signature of Lille striker Jonathan David.

arts.ttl: Martin Zubimendi addresses wild rumours he 'regrets rejecting Liverpool' - after £52m midfielder opted to stay with Real Sociedad for the 'food and hikes'
arts.sum: Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi insists he has zero regrets about turning down a move to Liverpool in the summer despite his side's poor start to the season.

arts.ttl: Zubimendi reveals more about Liverpool snub
arts.sum: Martín Zubimendi has finally opened up about his surprising decision in the summer to turn down a lucrative offer from Liverpool in order to stay at his lifelong club, Real Sociedad. I think I found peace because I believed it was the best choice,” Zubimendi said during the press conference ahead of the Europa League match at the Reale Arena against Anderlecht on Thursday.

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool v Bologna on TV in Champions League tonight
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Italian side to Anfield on Wednesday night in Champions League action

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher reveals how Kate Abdo 'put him back in his place' after awkward joke about husband Malik Scott... as Liverpool legend admits he was acting 'like a little child'
arts.sum: Abdo subsequently addressed the incident live on television 24 hours later, delivering a brutal put-down to Carragher and now the Liverpool legend has lifted the lid on his side of the story.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna LIVE - team news, TV channel, kick-off time, score and commentary stream
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Paul Wheelock, Ian Doyle, Theo Squires, Keifer MacDonald)
arts.sum: Live updates from the Champions League clash between Liverpool and Bologna at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to build on win over AC Milan in opening matchday plus the latest from Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Champions League ties of Liverpool vs Bologna and Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich as both Premier League sides look to build on opening matchday wins.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna LIVE: Champions League team news, line-ups and more tonight
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s side look to build on their impressive 3-1 win over AC Milan at the San Siro in their European opener

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna LIVE! Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Arne Slot takes charge of first home European game as Reds boss

arts.ttl: Romano's 'difficult' response to BIZARRE Darwin Nunez rumour
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has rubbished the bizarre rumour that Atletico Madrid could sign Darwin Nunez from Liverpool . The fact that Slot does not appear to be his biggest fan has given rise to a bizarre rumour that Liverpool were planning to offload Nunez and potentially replace him with Real Madrid winger Rodrygo .
